title: Pricing FAQ
content: Emergency breakdown quick fix costs 549 INR. Flat tyre assist costs 399 INR. Battery jump-start costs 299 INR. Basic maintenance service starts from 1299 INR.

title: Booking Flow
content: Users select service from service page, add to cart, continue to checkout, provide billing details, and complete payment. After booking they can track mechanic location from orders and tracking pages.
